metadata.title:
'T0SET Tie IT

Chicago Hotel Difficulty


With the Union.

pages.raw_text:
Proprietor Heiberg Of the Chica-
go hotel was seen today regarding
the action taken up at the meeting
of the trades council last night
whereby the Chicago hotel was
placed on the unfair list.


Mr.. Heiberg stated he hardly
knew what to do, that he was pay
ing union wages and was not ad-
verse to unionism and had talked
to his cooks and walters about join
ing the Union, but they had not
done so.


We'll" said he, in conclusion, II
suppose there is no use to buck the
union, but hate to tie myself
down with a contract"


1t is thought from the converse
ton had with Mr.. Heiberg that all
difficulties existing between his
house and the union will soon be
settled.
